component.name: QRaw
component.summary: A non-destructive, GPU-accelerated RAW image editor (based on RapidRAW by CyberTimon, AGPL-3.0)

description.p: QRaw is a modern, high-performance RAW image editor built on top of RapidRAW (by CyberTimon, AGPL-3.0). It delivers GPU-accelerated, non-destructive editing in a lightweight package for Windows, macOS, and Linux.
Initial QRaw release based on RapidRAW v1.5.1.
